scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development BASE_ENV=development node_modules/.bin/webpack serve --config config/webpack.config.js --progress
scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production webpack --config ./config/webpack.config.js --mode production --progress && npm run tar
scripts.analyzer: cross-env NODE_ENV=production BUILD_ENV=analyzer webpack -c config/webpack.config.js --mode production
